results.description: All-in-one impact statement is captured and confirmed.

turnResults.user: We serve middle school students in North Philadelphia and our long-term goal is that they read on grade level and transition successfully to high school.
turnResults.reply: That's a great start. It clearly states who you serve, where, and what you hope to achieve. Based on what you've said, I've drafted this overall Intended Impact statement: 'Middle school students in North Philadelphia will read on grade level and transition successfully to high school.' Does that capture your ultimate goal correctly?

turnResults.user: Yes, that captures it.
